A blue icon appears next to the agenda name.

call-to-action|index|requestFail: An error occurred while sending your request, please try again later.
call-to-action|index|requestMessageInvit: This feature allows you to invite a user(s) with a custom message, and writing a message to all members.
call-to-action|index|requestTitleOfficia: Request to activate an official agenda
call-to-action|index|requestMessageOffic: Please post at least one event on your agenda before your request for officialization.
call-to-action|index|requestMessageAgend: You need to add multiple fields to your form,, adapt their order or labels? Send us a short message
call-to-action|index|requestTitlePrivate: Request to activate a private agenda
call-to-action|index|requestMessagePriva: This is a new feature, let us know more about your requirement:
call-to-action|index|requestMessageCusto:
Do you need to add custom fields to the event form of your agenda?

Or to link some events of your agenda with each other?

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
call-to-action|index|requestMessageAdvan:
Do you need complete control over the presentation of your integrated agenda?

Template customization will give you the tools to define precisely what to display and where to display it.

Our team can also offer to integrate your agenda according to your requirements.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
call-to-action|index|requestTitlePublicA: Request to activate a public agenda
call-to-action|index|requestTitleLimitDa: Add limits to the dates of contributed events
call-to-action|index|requestMessageLimit:
Limit contributions to predefined event dates. 

Interested by this feature? Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
call-to-action|index|requestMessageCusto:
This feature allows you to customize messages sent to contributors when they are invited to contribute or when their event is published.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
call-to-action|index|requestMessageModer:
Moderators are members that can edit the events of an agenda and change event states, without having access to agenda settings.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
call-to-action|index|requestTitleWriteTo: Request to activate the "Write to them" function
call-to-action|index|requestMessageWrite:
Send a message to all members of your agenda or target the ones that have not yet contributed.

Give us details on your requirements and we'll get back to you shortly!
call-to-action|index|requestMessageAggre: Automatically aggregate events that were published on other agendas. Request the activation of this feature, the first 365 aggregations are free

corpo|index|punchLine: Get an efficient public calendar now
corpo|index|function1Description: Your event pages are detailed and you can organize your calendar with multiple criterias.
corpo|index|function2Head: For small, medium and large collaborative calendars
corpo|index|function2Description: Regardless of your staff size, your calendar fits your context !
corpo|index|function3Description:
Are you in charge of a federation ? territory ?
Equip each local organization with a calendar and get an aggregated view of the event activity of your network !
corpo|index|function4Description: Sync your calendar with your mediums and share it with the whole world as #OpenData.
corpo|metas|title: OpenAgenda - Create an efficient public calendar
corpo|metas|description: Broadcast your events on the first open data collaborative calendar platform. It's free!
corpo|metas|keywords: collaborative calendars, calendar, events, online tool, productivity
corpo|pages|mainTitle: Reference and broadcast all your events
corpo|pages|mainSubtitle: Optimize cost and improve your events visibility
corpo|pages|mainDescription: OpenAgenda is a powerful calendar tool used by diverse actors like the Centre Pompidou museum, the Ministry of Culture, Nuit Debout and the region of Ile de France.
corpo|pages|mainConnectMedia: more than **a hundred medias** like le Parisien, Ouest France, ViaFrance & TootSweet
corpo|pages|mainConnectServices: third-party services like WeMap and OpenDataSoft
corpo|pages|mainConnectPersonal: personal calendars like Google Calendar, Outlook, Thunderbird, Lotus Notes
corpo|pages|mainBroadcastTitle: The events of your agenda or network is available for broadcast
corpo|pages|mainBroadcastText: Your events are broadcasted on agendas of the platform as well as with our partners
corpo|pages|mainBroadcastPoint1: Your events are **structured** following an international standard
corpo|pages|mainBroadcastPoint2: They can be aggregated in other agendas
corpo|pages|mainBroadcastPoint3: They are available for reuse by more than a hundred media, including Le Parisien, Ouest France, ViaFrance or TootSweet
corpo|pages|mainBroadcastPoint4: They are embedabble in your **[your website](/discover/your-website)**
corpo|pages|mainBETitle: Are you organizing a big event ?
corpo|pages|mainBEPoint4: Display your agenda on your site
corpo|pages|mainBEPoint5: Export on all your channels: newsletter, paper, etc.
corpo|pages|mainBEPoint6: Get privileged access to a dedicated support contact
corpo|pages|mainPricingAgendaPoint1: Launch now the calendar of your location, exhibition, festival, organisation.
corpo|pages|mainPricingAgendaPoint2: The cost is proportional to the degree of customization
corpo|pages|mainPricingAgendaPoint3: **Example of users** : Théâtre la Loge, ReedExpo, Salon de l’agriculture, Fête De la Science, Semaine de l'industrie
corpo|pages|mainPricingNetworkPoint1: You animate a territory, a federation, several local coordinators ? The network of agendas is for you.
corpo|pages|mainPricingNetworkPoint2: The pricing is proportional to the size of your network.
corpo|pages|mainPricingNetworkPoint3: **Example of users**: INA, Bordeaux Métropole, Journées Européennes du Patrimoine.
corpo|pages|agendaPricingPresTitle: Efficiently manage from the smallest to the largest collaborative agenda
corpo|pages|agendaPricingPresPoint1: Your event pages are detailed and you can organize your calendar with multiple criterias.
corpo|pages|agendaPricingPresPoint2: Regardless of your staff size, your calendar fits your context
corpo|pages|agendaPricingPresPoint3: Sync your calendar with your mediums and share it with the whole world as #OpenData.
corpo|pages|agendaPricingFreeFeature3: Standard event fields + one custom field
corpo|pages|agendaPriceCustomFeature2: Bounded contribution dates, locations and contributors
corpo|pages|agendaPricingNetwork: Do you need to manage several agendas?

corpo|pages|networkPricingDescription: Pricing for a network of agendas
corpo|pages|networkPricingPresText:
You coordinate a federation ? A territory ?
Deploy a network of agendas and aggregate all your events in real-time
corpo|pages|networkHowMany: You do not know how many events you manage per year ? We do.
corpo|pages|basicOfferHeadDescription: Create a participative agenda for free to better broadcast your events
corpo|pages|basicOfferDescription: Create as many agendas as you want, they are free and always will be
corpo|pages|unlimitedEvents: Create and manage as many events as you need in any agenda
corpo|pages|unlimitedMembers: Manage your agenda on your own or mobilize a community around a common agenda
corpo|pages|unlimitedDownloads: Save, syncronize, export and broadcast your events in all useful formats
corpo|pages|openDataDownload: Available in csv, xls, rss, ics, xml, json
corpo|pages|openDataReuse: reusable by our partners and all interested third-parties
corpo|pages|multimediaEvents: Multimedia descriptions: add videos, soundtracks and images
corpo|pages|multimediaEventsGeo: Rich geocoding: type the address and all localization details are retrieved: latitude, longitude, region, country...

corpo|pages|broadcastText: Export your agenda on multiple mediums:

corpo|pages|networkExport: The events of your networks can be exported in a unified interface

corpo|pages|supportLaunch: Get a one-to-one conversation at the start of your project to start on the right foot

corpo|pages|tailoredDescription: A tailored offer to match your event network needs
corpo|pages|expertiseTitle: The OpenAgenda team can intervene at several levels in your project

corpo|pages|portalTailored: A hosted website tailored for your brand
corpo|pages|portalSearch: All search features available on OpenAgenda
corpo|pages|portalContent: Content managed and moderated by the team
corpo|pages|collaborateHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - Collaborate over large event datasets
corpo|pages|collaborateDescription: Thanks to contributive agendas, manage thousands of events with your team of collaborators
corpo|pages|stakeholderTitle: Invite contributors and administrators to collaborate on your agenda
corpo|pages|stakeholderInvitation: Your agenda can be open to all contributions or be limited to a set of invited contributors
corpo|pages|stakeholderInfo: Get details on your contributors such as contact number, role and organization name
corpo|pages|buildNetworkDescription: Whether your organization is a region, an association, a company with multiple branches, a network of agendas will allow you to get a holistic view of all your events.
corpo|pages|buildNetworkHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - Build a network of agendas
corpo|pages|exportsTitle: Make your events available in all file and export formats
corpo|pages|exportsReuse: Events are re-used by third-party platforms as well as other OpenAgendas
corpo|pages|exportsNetworkable: Your content can be broadcasted within a parent network such as a city or region a parent company or specialized media
corpo|pages|exportsBroadcastDescription: Your events are reusable and reused throughout the internet
corpo|pages|privateTitle: Do you want to limit access to your Agenda?
corpo|pages|privateVisibility: Private agendas are only visible to chosen identified users
corpo|pages|reportingToolHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - Use a contributive agenda for reporting your specialized event data
corpo|pages|reportingToolDescription: Define private and public custom fields and download all data in one click
corpo|pages|paolaScottonTestimony: The ideal solution to centralize all information related to a common event. The platform is very intuitive and simple to used, it keeps all its promises.
corpo|pages|virginieStaelsTestimony: We organized a nationwide operation, where nearly 100 contributors published events in our OpenAgenda calendar. In the end, the feedbacks praised the ease of use and stability of the agenda. The solution contributed largely to the success of our ministry's project!
corpo|pages|virginieStaelsOrganization:
Ministry of National Education,
Higher Education and Research
corpo|pages|jeromeMessinaTestimony: OpenAgenda is becoming the reference tool in France. The interface is intuitive and offers numerous features. We use it today for all our national events ( European Heritage Days, Fête de la Musique, European Museum Night, etc).
corpo|pages|anneLaureJanvierTestimony: I chose OpenAgenda as it matched exactly to our requirements: unify in a single interface all animations with detailed timings and locations. The platform allows us to configure once an event spreading over multiple days.
corpo|pages|xavierMasclauxTestimony: We needed to create collaborative calendars with our partners dedicated to events in the digital, innovation and coworking fields. OpenAgenda allowed us to gain time by allowing us to mutualize our events and broadcast them more globally via our websites and beyond
corpo|pages|contactDescription: Give us a call or right a note, we will get back to you shortly
corpo|pages|testimoniesHeadDescription: Find out what our clients say about OpneAgenda
corpo|pages|basicSumIntegration: Embeddable in any website or Facebook page
corpo|pages|basicSumBroadcast: Events are reusable by our and your partners
corpo|pages|premiumSumAggregation: Aggregate events from other agendas into yours
corpo|pages|premiumSumTemplating: Advanced customization for your embedded agenda
corpo|pages|embedDescription: Embed your white-labelled OpenAgenda in your site
corpo|pages|embedDiscover: Discover a selection of embedded agendas

inboxes|index|supportInboxDesc:
Do you have a technical question about using OpenAgenda? The answer is certainly in the documentation.

See the documentation

If your question relates more to the administrators of a calendar, you can reach them via the messaging at the bottom of each of your event files or directly on the calendar by clicking on "contact".

See my calendars or see my events

For any other question, you can join us directly:
